_documentation: This file is intentionally empty — no real social accounts have been added yet. Populate the 'socials' array below when accounts exist; the Socials page and footer render directly from it. JSON has no comment syntax, so the shape is documented here instead. Each entry needs: platform (one of: discord, github, youtube, tiktok, instagram, facebook, x, reddit, linkedin, twitch, email, website), handle (display label, e.g. '@nexorealm'), url (full link — for email use 'mailto:you@example.com'), icon (lucide-react icon name matching the platform, e.g. 'github', 'youtube', 'twitch', 'mail', 'globe').
